remove.description: Indicates if all kitty versions should be removed

trim.description: Indicates that all kitty versions present on the system that don't match requested versions will be removed

remove.description: Indicates that the path addition of the default version should be removed. Consequently also removes the desktop entry.

version.description: Indicates which version should be default and added to path. Can be set to 'latest' or 'nightly'.

desktop.description: Indicates that a desktop entry should be added. The default version will be used

keywords.description: List of keywords that will be added to the desktop entry

force.description: Indicates if a desktop entry should be created if one already exists

remove.description: Indicates if the desktop entry should be removed

releases.description: A list of releases that should be managed

items.description: An object describing the version that should be managed

version.description: The version to install, or can be set to 'latest' or 'nightly'

checksum.description: The optional checksum for the artifact. In cases such as when 'version' is set to 'latest' then this value can be omitted. Otherwise it is advised to use a artifact checksum.

remove.description: Indicates if this version should be removed
